data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Task complete. Summary: (1) INSTALL.md exists at repo root (created by another batch task). (2) bash tests/test-doc-links.sh passes 15/15 - README.md and plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md all links valid. (3) [test_install_doc_contract] RED marker removed from .test-index - staged. (4) ruff check: All checks passed. Note: [test_doc_links] marker never existed; actual marker was [test_install_doc_contract]. Also note tests/run-all.sh has pre-existing failures (compute-diff-hash, commit-tracker) from main branch, unrelated to this change.
